question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the main sections of the thesis. It only mentions 'Problēmas nostādne' and 'Informācijas tehnoloģiju un programmatūras izstrādes joma', which are not clear chapter titles.

question: Description
feedback: The text provides a brief description of the contents, but it is more focused on explaining the problem and the proposed solution rather than outlining what will be covered in each section. It lacks specific details about what will be discussed in each part.

question: Structure
feedback: While the text gives an idea of the flow of the thesis (problem, proposed solution, and then implementation), it does not clearly outline the general structure. The lack of explicit chapter titles makes it difficult to understand how the thesis will be organized.
